title: Add Ruff ratchet scope
goal: Add or verify Ruff ratchet configuration and document incremental lint expansion without broad style churn

acceptance.assertion: The slice is implemented or explicitly closed against current main/PR state with no hidden broadening.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: RepoBrief boundaries are preserved: no hidden refresh, no Git mutation in RepoBrief core, no review/runtime correctness claim.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Relevant tests/checks are run, or a precise blocker/gap is recorded.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The output states what the evidence does not establish.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Lenskit PR #910 added a scoped Ruff ratchet config and kept path-scoped bare Ruff jobs on default rules.
validation: GitHub CI for PR #910 passed before merge.

verified_acceptance.rbv1-t013-scope-bound: Ruff ratchet scope was implemented as a dedicated ruff-ci.toml used by the repo-wide lint job only.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t013-boundary-preserved: The lint change does not alter RepoBrief runtime behavior, refresh, Git mutation or review authority.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t013-tests-or-gap: Local Ruff and GitHub CI validation passed before Lenskit PR #910 was merged.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t013-non-claims: The ratchet does not claim the whole repo is clean under all Ruff defaults and does not claim runtime/test/review completeness.
